---
title: "Project Summary"
---

## Overview

This page summarises key project metadata. Update values in `project-metadata.yml` and re-render.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Project title | {{< meta project_title >}} |
| Lead author | {{< meta lead_author >}} |
| Version | {{< meta project_version >}} |
| AI used | {{< meta ai_used >}} |
| Governance complete | {{< meta governance_complete >}} |
| Reproducibility ready | {{< meta reproducibility_ready >}} |
| Last updated | {{< meta last_updated >}} |

::: {.callout-note}
This is a static summary populated at render time from `project-metadata.yml`.
:::
